quote: We have 14 locations across 3 provinces. Before Sentinel, monitoring was a full-time job. Now one person manages everything from a single screen.
name: Roberto Acuña

quote: Sentinel detected a shoplifter we'd been missing for months. The AI flags the behavior pattern, not just the act. That's the difference.
name: Marcela Ríos

quote: The compliance reports alone justified the price. Insurance audit took 2 hours instead of 3 days. Zero manual preparation.
name: Hernán Díaz
